test-method.name: testAdminSearchUser
test-method.description: Verify Admin Page header and search functionality

test-method.name: testPIMSearch
test-method.description: Verify PIM module navigation and employee search

test-method.name: testDashboardOverview
test-method.description: Verify Dashboard header and side menu count

test-method.name: testDashboardWidgets
test-method.description: Verify essential dashboard widgets are present
